ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Continued To Feb-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Bridges for Jennifer Louie (Administrator).

The Court stated that it is looking for an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution. Mr. Bridges apologized to the Court, stated that it slipped through the cracks, that the Client's Sister had an issue with hoarding, that they kept finding savings bonds and that they have been on a hunt to find assets. Mr. Bridges also stated that they have found over four hundred bonds ranging from $25.00 to $1,000.00, that they received an IRS refund for $1,031.00, that there is a Bank of America checking account with $122.22 and a life insurance policy in the amount of $24,996.22, and that the assets were placed into an estate checking account. In addition, Mr. Bridges stated that he is on page 34 of the list of bonds, that he still has about 100 or so bonds left to list and that he needs to get it to the Probate Referee. Status on close of estate is continued to February 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Counsel is unable to do final distribution, he is to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration by February 19, 2020.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Lelu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
